text: {"fixed_xml":"<ITEM>In denen Thurneysischen Buchläden allhier, seynd dato folgende zwey Bücher zu haben, so in Nancy durch Subscriptions gedruckt worden. <BIBL><TITLE>Dictionnaire Universel- Francois & Latin, Vulgairement appellé Dictionaire de Trevoux</TITLE>, avec des Remarques d Erudition & de Critique <VOLUME>5. Tom.</VOLUME> <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT> <YEAR>1741</YEAR>; davon die 3. ersten Tom. dato schon zu beziehen sind; das gantze Werck kostet samt der Fracht <PRICE>fl. 24</PRICE></BIBL>. <BIBL><TITLE>Dictionaire Oeconomique, continant les moyens d'Augmenter son bien & de conserver sa sante</TITLE>, par <AUTHOR>Mister Noel Chomel</AUTHOR>, Augmente dun Nouveau Supplement de deux Volumes, par <AUTHOR>F. Marset, Doct. en Medecine</AUTHOR>. <FORMAT>2 vol. avec fig.</FORMAT> <VOLUME>4. Tom.</VOLUME> <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT> <YEAR>1741</YEAR>; davon der erste Tomus dato bey ihnen zu beziehen ist; die gantze Werck kostet samt der Fracht <PRICE>fl. 18</PRICE></BIBL>. So dann sind bey ihnen auch genugsam annoch zu haben: <BIBL><TITLE>Dictionaire Historique & Critique de Mr. Bayle</TITLE> <VOLUME>4. Tom.</VOLUME> <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT> <PLACE>Amsterd.</PLACE> <YEAR>1740</YEAR>. <PRICE>L. 27</PRICE></BIBL>. <BIBL><TITLE>Corpus Juris Civilis Romani, cum Notis Gotofrest</TITLE> <VOLUME>2. Tom.</VOLUME> <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT> <YEAR>1740</YEAR>. <PRICE>fl. 10. 48. xr.</PRICE></BIBL>. <BIBL><TITLE>Dictionaire Royal, Francois-Allemand-Latin, par le R. P. Fr. Pomey</TITLE> <VOLUME>3. Voll.</VOLUME> <FORMAT>4°.</FORMAT> <YEAR>1741</YEAR>. <PRICE>fl. 5. 24. xr.</PRICE></BIBL></ITEM>","number_of_corrections":12,"explanation":"1. Replaced 'PRIZE' with 'PRICE' for consistency. 2. Fixed 'Subscriptions' (corrected from 'S\u001a\u000bscriptiones'). 3. Fixed 'appellé' (corrected from 'appell\u001a\t'). 4. Fixed 'bien' (corrected from 'dien'). 5. Fixed 'deux' (corrected from 'deur'). 6. Fixed 'Medecine' (corrected from 'Medecines'). 7. Fixed '2 vol. avec fig.' (corrected from '2vec fig.'). 8. Fixed 'die' (corrected from 'di\u001a\f'). 9. Removed hyphen after 'Dictionaire Historique & Critique de Mr. Bayle'. 10. Fixed 'PRICE' tag for 'L. 27' (previously 'PRIZE'). 11. Fixed 'PRICE' tag for 'fl. 10. 48. xr.' (previously 'PRICE' was misspelled as 'PRICE' in one instance). 12. Fixed '4°.' (corrected from '4\u001a\u0004.')."}

parsed.explanation: 1. Replaced 'PRIZE' with 'PRICE' for consistency. 2. Fixed 'Subscriptions' (corrected from 'Sscriptiones'). 3. Fixed 'appellé' (corrected from 'appell	'). 4. Fixed 'die' (corrected from 'di '). 9. Removed hyphen after 'Dictionaire Historique & Critique de Mr. Bayle'. 10. Fixed 'PRICE' tag for 'L. 27' (previously 'PRIZE'). 11.
